The receiving party hereby covenants that,

Be protected and kept in strict confidence by the receiving party which must use the same degree of precaution and safegu ards as it uses to protect its own proprietary information of like importance,
Be only disclosed to and used by those persons who have a need to know and solely for the purpose specified in this agreement,

Not be used in whole or in part for any purpose other than the purpose of this agreement as specified in the preamble and for the project above without the prior written consent of the disclosing party,

Neither be disclosed nor caused to be disclosed whether directly or indirectly to any third party or persons other than t hose mentioned in subparagraph b) or the buyer clients or its co -contractors for the project,
Neither be copied,
Except as aforementioned,
Has come into the public domain prior to,
Is already known to the receiving party,
Has been lawfully received from a third party without restrictions or breach of this agreement,
Has been or is published without violation of this agreement, or
Is independently developed in good faith by an employee or employees of that receiving party who did not have access to t he proprietary information,
Is approved for release or use by written authorization of the disclosing party.
Except as provided under clause 12.2 of the general purchase conditions,
The execution,
This contract shall be governed by buyer country laws and its appropriate courts of paris.

Certain definitions .
The term “ information ” means
All financial,

All customer information (as such term in is defined below and only if customer information is exchanged under this non-disclosure agreement).

Exclusions from application .
This non-disclosure agreement shall not apply to information that,
At the time of disclosure by or on behalf of disclosing party hereunder,
Is rightfully in the possession or knowledge of recipient or its representatives prior to its disclosure by or on behalf of disclosing party hereunder,
Is rightfully acquired by recipient or its representative(s) from a third party who is not under any obligation of confidence with respect to such information,
Is developed by recipient or its representatives independently of the information disclosed hereunder by or on behalf of disclosing party (as evidenced by written documentation).

Under those circumstances where recipient files a lawsuit for retaliation against disclosing party for reporting a suspected violation of law,
Nothing herein or in any other agreement between the parties is intended to conflict with 18 u.

Relationship of the parties
This agreement is not intended to and does not obligate either party:
To disclose any specific confidential information; or
To enter into any subsequent business arrangements regarding the permitted purpose or any other matter.
This agreement does not create any exclusivity between the parties;
No  joint  venture,

Interpretation
Unless inconsistent with the context,
“agreement” means this agreement and all amendments thereof;
“confidential information” means any confidential information,
“disclosing party” means the party disclosing confidential information;
“receiving party” means the party receiving confidential information;
“client” means client name,
Unless inconsistent with the context, an expression which denotes –
Any one gender includes the other gender;
Natural person includes a juristic person, partnership,
The singular includes the plural and vice versa .
